description: Search apps, contacts, files, settings, calendar, and the web from one bar Quick Search is a fast Android launcher and search app that unifies results from apps, app shortcuts, contacts, calendar events, files, device settings, app settings, and the web—plus built-in tools like calculator, unit converter, currency converter, and optional AI search. Search everything • Apps and shortcuts with smart ranking and typo tolerance • Contacts with call, text, and messaging integrations • Calendar events, notes, files, and folders • Android system settings and Quick Search settings • 25+ web search engines with customizable shortcuts Tools from the search bar • Calculator, unit converter, currency rates, world clock, date math • Optional AI answers when you add your own API keys (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, Groq, or compatible APIs) Customize your experience • Overlay mode, home screen widgets, Quick Settings tile, or default launcher • Themes, Material You colors, wallpapers, bottom search bar, and font size • Import/export settings and granular permission controls Privacy Search runs on your device. There are no ads or analytics. Network access is used only for features you enable (web search, optional AI, currency rates).
